title: What to know about Ocimum sanctum before using it medicinally
intro_desc: Ocimum sanctum is a revered herb known for its potent health properties, which have been harnessed to improve cognitive function, boost the immune system, and alleviate stress and anxiety. Cultivated for its fragrant leaves and compact growth habit, Ocimum sanctum is a popular choice among gardeners and chefs alike, with its delicate purple flowers adding a touch of elegance to gardens and indoor spaces. Botanically classified as a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, Ocimum sanctum is characterized by its distinctive heart-shaped leaves and slender stems. Revered in ancient Indian and Ayurvedic traditions, the herb has been mentioned in the sacred Hindu text, the Atharva Veda, and is also associated with the goddess Lakshmi in Hindu mythology.
